entities.name: V
entities.context: User who manually spawns drops by pasting briefs into new threads

entities.name: /zo/ask
entities.context: Headless API endpoint used for auto-spawning drops

entities.name: Drop
entities.context: Task unit in Pulse build system, identified by D<stream>.<seq> format

entities.name: Stream
entities.context: Organizational grouping for parallel drop execution

entities.name: spawn_mode
entities.context: Configuration option controlling drop creation: auto (headless) or manual (V-initiated)

entities.name: Pulse
entities.context: Build orchestration system that manages drops and streams

relationships.context: Manual spawn mode requires V to paste brief into new thread
Auto spawn mode uses /zo/ask for headless drop creation
Drops are the task units within the Pulse build system
Streams organize drops for parallel execution
Each drop belongs to a stream, indicated by D<stream>.<seq> naming
